calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Stipulated Judgement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Peter Liederman, Esq. specail appearance for the Plaintiff: Citybank (South Dakota) N.A.
Defendant: Edward L. Mall present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to an entry of Stipulated Judgement for
Damages of $7,510.44
Costs $284.00
Total $7,794.44
Stipulated Judgment was submitted and signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Set For Trial On Mar-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
